description.short: Discover The Pade Hotel, ideally situated in Banda Aceh, known for its rich history and stunning coastline. This exquisite hotel offers luxurious rooms designed in Moroccan style, featuring balconies with breathtaking views of lush rice fields and mountains, perfect for two travelers seeking tranquility. Enjoy a refreshing dip in the pool while overlooking picturesque surroundings or unwind at the bar with a cool drink after a day of exploring. The on-site restaurant boasts a diverse menu to satisfy various tastes, ensuring every meal is a delight. With air conditioning and complimentary Wi-Fi, comfort is guaranteed for an unforgettable stay. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.reviewComments: The Pade Hotel in Banda Aceh is an excellent choice, especially for family travelers. The rooms are incredibly comfortable, the service is exceptional, and the staff is consistently friendly and attentive. Highly recommended for a relaxing stay!
comments.reviewTitle: Best place to stay for family

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Likes:
Large room; big, comfortable bed; strong WiFi; TV with Netflix, Apple, YouTube, etc; decent shower; excellent breakfast; good service.

Dislikes:
Reality somewhat different to the publicity photos; has definitely seen better days with obvious signs of wear and tear and a lack of attention to detail - stained sheets, broken seal on refrigerator led to water leaking all over the floor, toilet had apparently not been cleaned with a brush in ages, wonky pictures on the wall, bathroom extractor fan not working, cigarette burns on sofa, etc; large balcony but with nothing whatsoever on it; poor sound-proofing due to inter-connecting door with next room (could even hear bags rustling); no ramp for luggage upon arrival, just a dozen or so steep steps from the driveway.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Stayed here 1 night before Eid to see how the celebrations go in Aceh. I have to say the staff went out of their way to help me as I had forgotten to bring my contact lense solution. As this was the eve of a big celebration/public holiday, I was not expecting for much to happen, but reception managed to get it for me for which I am extremely grateful for. Waking up to the view of the paddy fields and mountains was perfect, and the beds and pillows were super comfortable. Would stay again!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Overall a good place to stay if you prefer away from city. A nice coffee place across the hotel for some good coffee and meals. Room could be better with better lighting. Take the 2nd or 3rd floor as 1st floor at ground level is more open to public and you don't have much privacy. 

Breakfast is just average as compared to some other hotels in Banda Aceh - could have been better. 

Staff were friendly and helpful.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel has very distinctive theme. Its main strong point is the beautiful architecture and the majestic mountain view through the main hotel hall. For time spending, it offers a pool, gym centre, and cozy lobby. That being said, pool and gym are okay though a bit small. In front of the hotel, a food court is available till 11 p.m. All in all, this is a good resort hotel for short vacation which is close to the bus terminal but quite far from most of the city attractions

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The price, facilities, and services are balanced. There is no convenience store within the hotel, so you need to buy the necessary items in advance. The massages are quite cheap, but you shouldn't expect much quality; they are average for the price. The breakfast mainly features Acehnese and Indonesian dishes with a wide variety, while Western options are limited. I was particularly annoyed by the presence of flies. The room is dark since it only has downlights. It was difficult to put on makeup due to the rain and cloudy weather, making it unsuitable for work. One night, a noisy family checked in next door, which was bothersome. If someone checks in at night, I would prefer to be placed in a distant room where there are no neighbors. The shower has good water pressure. Amenities are replenished daily, and two bottles of water are provided for free. There is a toothbrush available, and there are irons and boards available for borrowing. A safe is also provided. It would be nice to have a store to buy souvenirs. I would have bought snacks, drinks, and hotel goods if they were for sale. Overall, it can be said to be reasonable for the price.
comments.reviewTitle: Satisfied with the appearance and landscape.
comments.originalComment:
価格と設備、サービスは見合っている。ホテル内に売店はないので、必要な物は買っておく必要がある。
マッサージは、かなり安い。しかし、質は期待してはいけない。値段相応。
朝食はアチェ、インドネシア料理がメインで、種類豊富。洋食は少ない。
どうしてもハエが居るのが気になった。
部屋はダウンライトしかないので暗い。
雨や曇りが多かったので、お化粧するのに暗くて困った。仕事にも適さない。
1日だけ、夜中にうるさい家族が隣に入り、迷惑だった。夜中にチェックインするなら、隣に人が居ない離れた部屋に入って欲しい。
シャワーの水圧もよい。
アメニティも毎日補充があり、水のボトルも2本無料で置いてくれる。歯ブラシあり。アイロンと台は借用可能。
セーフティボックスもある。
お土産を買える店があると嬉しい。軽食、飲み物、ホテルグッズなど売られていたら買うのになと思った。
総じて価格に対しリーズナブルといえる。

comments.reviewComments:
Hotel Arrival;
Reception was OK
Room;
Good Points
Spacious
Nice hot shower
Bad Points;
Very dated apart from the small LCD TV
Portable shower, broken

Room Experience;
After night 1 we learned very quickly go to bed early, as you WILL be woken up by the locals coming back from late dinners from 11pm to 1am, shouting and laughing then really giving the door a MEGA slamming.
Weird noise starts circa 6am that woke me up EVERY day
People packing at 3am kept me and my family up, again locals not caring for others
Breakfast:
They used to have a mix of Western and Asian, now mainly Asian
The toaster takes like 10 minutes to lightly color the stale bread
Flies in the salad on day one put me off the whole trip
No butter for two days
The tables poorly dressed, missing condiments for hot drinks and no salt or pepper
At least they were able to fry an egg!
Most staff bar reception and one helpful guy spoke English.
Restaurant;
Good, burger was good - when they had stock.
Room Service - ODD
comments.reviewTitle: Never again after 7 years of loyalty - Will stay away and go elsewhere

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very clean rooms; no problems at all with insects; A/C and water/shower/toilet all work well.  Breakfast buffet is good and staff is friendly and helpful.  Be sure to ask for a quiet room, towards the back of the hotel, facing the rice-paddy fields and away from the street noise: this is important, since the hotel is located on a busy road.  But you won't hear the noise at all if your room is at the back.  Overall, a very satisfying stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 2 travelers found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments:
I have been coming to this hotel for a few year's now and can give a end of year 2016 update.  The staff are, without doubt superb - very friendly and helpful and speak not bad English.

The Room: This room I was in was 3404, and I liked the view to the mountains, the a/c worked well also.  The room overall was very clean indeed, and the shower was so HOT and nice + good TV international channels.. on the downside, starting to look dated, but not as bad as the Hermes Hotel down the road (OMG) - maybe a lick of paint and a bigger TV, the DVD device did not work - even after replacement - Internet was poor, required me to go to reception area.

The Pool:  Last time I was here the pool was pea green, this time I could see my toes :) - the food menu is a good price - thumbs up.

Breakfast: Plenty of egg combo's before entering breakfast / restaurant area, good selection of local and international - being English missed a bit more of a Halal breakfast effort, staff again great.

Restaurant: Did not visit this time, but from previous visits, no issues just a little costly.

Bar: Considering the location, expect a high cost - in fact this was the most expensive can of beer per 100 ml I have experienced on planet Earth, it even beats Singapore! very pricey indeed - plus make sure you spray the mosquito stuff as they eat you alive here.

Parking: Limited, but I have a bike there so no problems.

Vehicle Services: Not used on this visit, but reasonable price for airport transfers and the like.

Internet: This was an annoying experience for me being an IT guy, with constant sign ins required to differing access points, but I think this will improve over time - hey it is Aceh after all.

Room / Restaurant Menu:  Comprehensive but double if not triple that of the restaurants outside the hotel who can match like for like the quality - that is if you know where to look :)

Conclusion - I hope the Pade can update the rooms a bit, the bed was very comfortable for me, reduce some of

We chose the Pade as a airport transit hotel in Banda Aceh. No real airport hotel yet in Banda Aceh. The Pade certainly is not the nearest one to the airport. It takes around 30 minutes by becak/car to reach the airport provided no traffic jam.

We didn't ask/arrange for airport transfer from the hotel. So, can't say whether or not the hotel arrange such thing.

The hotel basically provides a spacious room, good aircon, acceptable TV cable channels, free wifi, and nice view to the surrounding paddy field and hilly landscape at the far rear of the hotel. The TV will help you pass the time in the hotel. No swimming pool.

Hot water for shower is rather problematic. It's on and off during your shower from cold to terrible hot :(.

Food is really its good element. We had our dinner, breakfast, and snack there. And they were tasty.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We stayed here for 3 nights The first two nights we checked in deluxe room. The rooms are really cozy. They allowed us to use the entrance in the parking lot as my mother has difficulty climbing stairs of the main entrance. The staff are very polite and helpful. The scenery is just awesome. They have a jogging track in the paddy field and i really luv it. My nephew and niece enjoyed their dipin the swimming pool. we left our luggage as we headed to Pulau Weh and all is ready upon our return to the hotel. We even get two of our garden view suite upgraded to mauntain view suite. The staff also allowed us to use their internet line and printer as we have to check in online. (first time the family travelling with Air Asia :-) ). Overall we enjoy our stay here and will check in again in our next visit. Gud job Pade Hotel.

comments.reviewComments: Great Service and Clean Rooms.  Hot shower and large tub in the suites.  Enjoyed breakfast.  They allowed our kids (6 and 4) to stay using existing bedding and graciously chose not to charge us the typical Rp. 80,000 fee for the older one to have breakfast.  The room was nice. comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The Pade is a nice hotel, with a nice view of the padi fields. The room is clean, also the shower/ toilet. Clean sheet, clean toilet, clean shower -- those are the most important things when you're travelling for work, right? In addition, the room is spacious, the wifi connection is decent, the staff are nice and quite helpful, and if you get the room with a view, it can be soothing and calming.  It was raining when I was there, so the air is pretty nice and cool, but even if it's not, I reckon, from the way the hotel is designed, ventilation and air circulation would be good to give you fresh air, even when you're not using the air-con.
comments.reviewPositives: spacious room, cleanliness, the view

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The Pade was very much an unexpected find in what was , otherwise, a somewhat depressing city.  Check in was very quick and we were immediately taken to our room which was well-furnished and comfortable.  There was a lovely large balcony overlooking the beautiful and serene inner courtyard.  There were, however, no chairs on the balcony and we would have enjoyed spending time here had they been present.  We ate dinner two evenings in the hotel restaurant and the meals, while somewhat standard, were good.  The hotel is somewhat outside the city but as we were driving a rental car, this was no problem for us.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We have a very pleasant stay at Pade Hotel. A very helpful and friendly staff made this Eid Fitr staycation celebration really enjoyable. All corners of the hotel is really beautiful in morrocan design and instagrammable. We surely will come back again to Pade Hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I have a pleasant stay in Pade Hotel for 4 nights with my whole family. The staff is very helpful and friendly and the most important is The Food is Amazing. Either you have breakfasts, brunch dinner even supper (coz we keep ordering food until late nite) the food is really consistent in taste and well serve. The ambience of the hotel is really nice and beautiful day or nite with the marocco design architecture its really suit with our Eid Fitr Celebration staycation and for your instagram story or profile. We definitely back again!!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Barely, a *** accommodation.  I am not necessarily impressed by the service (=reasonable), nor by the facilities offered (=average).  I consider it overpriced (even considering my reduction).  The room is reasonably spacious with simple furnishings.  The bathroom is sufficient, a shower curtain can no longer / outdated.  Housekeeping management needs improvement: Twice, only after my reclamation, the room was cleaned.  In addition, it is particularly noisy, both "from the neighbors" the corridors and also "entering and leaving public" [I assume] going to the indoor pool across the courtyard.  The breakfast served (buffet) is mediocre and certainly not continental, as advertised.  I do not consider the (reception) staff very helpful or friendly.  Housekeeping, on the other hand, is very helpful and friendly.  Overall balance still moderately positive.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The first time staying at this hotel, I found that the hotel has unique architecture like in the Middle East, very comfortable for staying with a partner/family, the view from the hotel balcony is very nice, consisting of hills and rice fields, the staff service is friendly, the air conditioning is cold, the Wi-Fi is fast, the toilet is clean, and there are many delicious breakfast options.
comments.originalComment: Pertama kali menginap di hotel ini kesannya, hotelnya memiliki arsitektur unik seperti di Timur Tengah, sangat nyaman buat menginap dengan pasangan/keluarga, pemandangan dari balkon hotel sangat bagus yaitu berupa bukit dan sawah, pelayanan staffnya ramah, ac nya dingin, wifinya kencang, toiletnya bersih, pilihan sarapan nya juga banyak dan enak.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The service is good, the facilities are good, everything is good. The only thing that needs to be improved is the swimming pool facilities; it should be a pool for adults only, as it is deep and not suitable for children, especially toddlers, as it is very unsafe. comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Heerlijk tot rust gekomen na enerverende bootreis van Pulau Weh naar Bandar Aceh.
Prima wifi. 
Geen plattegrond van de stad te krijgen. Restaurant best redelijk (verse grouper gegrild!), maar wat op de kaart staat is maar zeer beperkt beschikbaar. Vruchtensappen uitstekend, maar ook beperkt in keuze. 
Gevaarlijk voor kleine kinderen die tussen muurspleten door kunnen vallen, van de trappen struikelen of in de decoratieve waterstroom tuimelen.
Zwembad ommuurd met water dat schoner kan. Hygiene rest hotel verder OK.
men rekent 100.000 rupiah voor vervoer naar de grootste moskee of naar het vliegveld.
comments.reviewPositives: Open bouw met ruim spel voor wind en schaduw aan de rand van een rommelige stad vol brommers en autoos. Ontspannen zit in lounge met zicht op rijstvelden en bergen.Heel vriendelijk personeel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Hotel masih baru dan bagus. 
Tetapi mungkin bisa ditingkatkan kualitas jika diperhatikan hal hal berikut.
1.  Pintu kamar mandi kurang bersih. Terlihat dari dalam kamar mandi.
2.  Kolam berenang diterangkan mulai pkl.8:00, tetapi tidak dibuka pkl. 8:00.
3. TV terlalu canggih sehingga susah dicari sialan yg mau saya tonton.
Terima kasih. 
Secara umum bagus, hanya beberapa hal tlg diperhatikan.
comments.reviewTitle: Bagus, tapi masih bisa ditingkatkan kualitasnya
